utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists five items: (1) health_coverage, (2) property_coverage, (3) travel_coverage, (4) additional_services, and (5) total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all five items with detailed descriptions and associated costs. Each section provides the required coverage type and specific cost details as required: health coverage includes both physical and mental health with costs; property coverage includes contents and electronics with costs; travel coverage specifies travel insurance with costs; additional services include enhancement features with costs; total budget includes monthly and annual cost breakdown. Therefore, all five items are present and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan is labeled 'Budget-Conscious Package (LifeFirst)', and includes LifeFirst-branded core coverage elements. For health coverage, the features—global coverage, preventive care, gym reimbursement, telemedicine—match those of the 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' under both physical and mental health in the ground-truth ratings. For property coverage, the plan name 'LifeFirst Standard Coverage' matches the LifeFirst entry under 'home_content' in the property_protection category. For travel coverage, the plan name and features (family and business travel, global assistance, emergency coordination) correspond to the 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' in the travel_insurance section. The 'enhanced_services' section includes 24/7 customer support, dedicated agent, and priority claims processing, which aligns with the 'Premium Insurance Membership' service under general_services.
